meta_title: For Freelancers: passive income to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancers: Build SaaS for Passive Income (Expert Guide)
content.seo_description: Overcome your lack of SaaS knowledge with this expert checklist. Learn to build automated, passive income assets using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Stop trading hours for dollars. By leveraging AI-native stacks like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can architect modular, low-maintenance micro-SaaS products. This workflow automates the heavy lifting of backend infrastructure, allowing you to focus on high-value features that generate recurring revenue without constant manual intervention or deep enterprise coding expertise.
content.intro:
You’re a freelancer stuck in the 'time-for-money' trap. Every project ends, the check clears, and you’re back to square one, chasing the next lead. The graveyard of freelance careers is paved with people who never figured out how to decouple their income from their hourly rate. You don't need a Computer Science degree to escape this; you need a system that builds for you while you sleep.

We are entering an era where 'SaaS knowledge' is no longer a barrier—it's a commodity. With AI agents acting as your senior engineering team, you can ship production-grade software in days, not months. This isn't just about coding; it’s about architecting digital assets that serve your clients or your own portfolio, turning your freelance skills into a compounding passive income machine.

steps.title: Define the Micro-Problem
steps.description: Identify a repetitive task your clients face that lacks a dedicated tool. Focus on high-frequency, low-complexity workflows.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this list of freelance tasks: [Insert Tasks]. Identify the top 3 niches where a micro-SaaS could automate these tasks and provide a subscription-based value proposition.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Analyze these 3 niches and generate a feature roadmap for a MVP micro-SaaS targeting freelancers.'

steps.title: Scaffold with Antigravity
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the foundational boilerplate, ensuring the architecture is scalable and secure from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, modular SaaS boilerplate using Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe. Include authentication, user dashboard, and billing integration.

steps.title: Build Core Logic with Claude
steps.description: Implement the unique value proposition. Use Claude Code to iterate on business logic without getting bogged down in syntax errors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a secure server-side function that processes user input and generates a PDF report based on the business logic defined in step 1.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement the report generation logic in /src/app/api/generate/route.ts'

steps.title: Automate Deployment Pipelines
steps.description: Configure CI/CD so your app deploys automatically on every push, minimizing operational overhead.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing and deployment to Vercel for this repository.

steps.title: Implement Stripe Subscription Logic
steps.description: Connect the stripe-webhooks to your database to automate user access based on payment status.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust webhook handler that updates the user's subscription status in Supabase based on Stripe's checkout.session.completed event.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create the stripe webhook handler in /src/app/api/webhook/route.ts'

pro_tips: Focus on 'pain-killer' SaaS (solving immediate revenue loss) over 'vitamin' SaaS (nice-to-have tools).
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your payment logic first; it prevents expensive bugs in production.
Keep your UI minimal. Use pre-built components from Shadcn/UI to save 20+ hours of styling time.
Automate your customer support via an AI agent that scans your docs, so you never touch a support ticket.
Always build with a 'kill-switch' in your database to toggle features on/off without redeploying code.
content.next_steps: After completing your MVP, focus exclusively on SEO-driven content marketing to drive organic traffic to your landing page. Do not spend time on paid ads until you have 10 paying users.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the 'perfect' time to start. The AI revolution is here, and those who master these tools today will capture the market tomorrow. Stop trading your time for scraps and start building your own empire. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
